payload:
BitNet-SOLE Research Loop — ternary base + ternary adapters, all local.

ARCHITECTURE: BitNet-SOLE — BitNet-2B-4T ternary base + ternary LoRA adapters (QAT with STE) + 1/N composition.
STATE: Read .ralph/current_direction.md for active phase. Read HYPOTHESES.yml (bitnet section) for full roadmap.
CONTEXT: VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, references/BITNET_SOLE_RESEARCH.md, plans/concurrent-swimming-tarjan.md.

SCALE CONSTRAINT: micro only. Everything runs LOCALLY on Apple Silicon via MLX. No RunPod. ... [truncated, 2717 chars total]

exp_bitnet_ternary_convergence: SUPPORTED (marginal). K1 pass (3/5 converge), K2 marginal kill (+1.6% ternary vs FP16 composed, single seed), K3 pass (ratio 3.45x). Individual ternary 4.6% better. 400 steps tested. Needs multiseed validation.

exp_bitnet_ternary_convergence: REVISE (5 fixes). 1) Resolve status inconsistency (supported vs killed). 2) Acknowledge confounded K2 (ternary-400 vs FP16-200). 3) Document FP16 latent composition limitation. 4) Fix K1 convergence criterion. 5) Verify FP16 adapter provenance.

exp_bitnet_ternary_convergence REVISED: all 5 reviewer fixes applied. Verdict: SUPPORTED (K2 inconclusive due to confounded comparison, multi-seed pending). K1: 5/5 by val PPL. FP16 latent composition limitation documented. Provenance verified clean.

exp_bitnet_ternary_convergence SUPPORTED. Adversarial re-review PROCEED. K2 reframed as INCONCLUSIVE (confounded). All 5 fixes verified. Unblocks: multiseed_validation, task_eval, scale_n15, sole_vs_monolithic.
exp_bitnet_multiseed_validation SUPPORTED. CV(ratio)=0.4% (kill<50%), max_ratio=3.45x (kill<10x). 3 seeds (42,137,314) near-identical. Unblocks: scale_n15, task_eval.

exp_bitnet_multiseed_validation: 3 fixes required. (1) compose_adapters averages A,B factors separately giving 1/N^2 scaling + cross-terms instead of 1/N — fix implementation or correct MATH.md to match. (2) Clarify seed-42 discrepancy with prior experiment seeding scheme. (3) Use sample std (N-1) not population std (N) for CV calc.

exp_bitnet_multiseed_validation REVISED: 3 fixes applied — (1) MATH.md rewritten to describe averaged-factor composition (1/N^2 effective scaling), (2) seed-42 discrepancy clarified with seeding scheme details, (3) sample std (N-1) used, CV 0.4%→0.5%. Verdict remains SUPPORTED. No re-run needed.
exp_bitnet_multiseed_validation PROVEN (post-REVISE). CV=0.5% (100x margin), ratio=3.45x (2.9x margin), 3 seeds. Averaged-factor composition with 1/N^2 scaling. Unblocks: scale_n15, task_eval.

exp_bitnet_task_eval KILLED (K1+K2). Composed worse than base on 3/5 metrics (60%>40%). Math 0pp gain (need 3pp). PPL improvement does NOT transfer to task accuracy at 2B scale with NTP training. Medical exception (+4.9pp) shows format-aligned training works. Path forward: instruction tuning, larger base, task-specific routing.

## Reason
max_runtime

## Status
Stopped at runtime limit.

## Summary

- Duration: 6h 17m 41s
- Exit code: 2
